title: sphaeranthus amaranthoides
intro: Sphaeranthus amaranthoides, also known as Button Bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Sphaeranthus amaranthoides include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and can be used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, flu, and skin conditions.
